sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16331" key="a)/smhktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄσμηκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n16331.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not cleansed with soap,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:195" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">195</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
